subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Be thou not sorrowful or grief-stricken at the ascension of the assured leaf unto the precincts of the Most Great Mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از صعود ورقه موقنه بجوار رحمت کبری محزون و متاثر مباش و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @soul; spirit after death
